name: WISCONSIN ELECTRIC POWER CO
summary: Wisconsin Electric Power Company (WE) is a regulated utility providing electric and natural gas service. It operates electric generation facilities including coal, natural gas combustion turbines, reciprocating engines, biomass, solar, wind, and battery storage assets. WE also distributes natural gas through local distribution infrastructure. The company operates under the WEC Energy Group corporate umbrella and is regulated by the PSCW and FERC.
